reviews.text: Would highly recommend Doug and Jackie! They are both incredible photographers and so kind and thoughtful! We had such a pleasure working with them! They have great energy and provided  direction but also took in our thoughts too! They captured our wedding and energy perfectly! :)

Doug and Jackie were our photographers for our wedding (recommended by our wedding planner, L Elizabeth Events) and we could not have made a better decision! 11/10 recommend! Doug and Jackie are an incredible husband and wife team and work together to capture the most amazing memories. They are so much fun and keep you engaged and laughing the whole time. We had an initial engagement shoot in Boulder and after spending the day with Doug and Jackie, we knew we had made the right photographer choice! Our engagement photos turned out incredible and we even got some pictures with our senior pet rabbits, who passed a few months after the pictures were taken. We were so glad to have had some professional photos taken with them to treasure forever! Our wedding was at the Beaver Creek Chapel and our reception was at SaddleRidge on 9/28/2024. Doug and Jackie arrived in the morning and took getting ready photos, our first look pictures (both husband and dad), bridal party, and immediate family photos, which all turned out amazing. We were married on the most beautiful fall day with amazing yellow foliage and Doug and Jackie captured the leaves and incredible scenery perfectly. Our ceremony pictures, couple photos in the aspens, and amazing reception pictures all let us re-live the day. Doug and Jackie provide all day coverage, so they were there with us from start to finish on the dancefloor. I have not stopped looking at the pictures since we got them and have made them screensavers on all of my devices :) We loved working with Doug and Jackie and would recommend them to anyone!

We had an absolutely amazing experience working with Doug and Jackie Treiber for our wedding! Their experience was evident from the start—they knew exactly how to capture beautiful photos efficiently and from multiple angles without ever feeling intrusive. Communication was seamless, which was especially important since this was a destination wedding and we were coordinating from out of state. They were incredibly organized and thorough, making sure every single moment we requested was captured perfectly. On the day of the wedding, they were funny, energetic, uplifting, and so easy to work with, which made the day even more enjoyable! They offer great package deals and have unlimited wedding day coverage. The photos turned out AMAZING—we are beyond thrilled with them. We truly cannot recommend them enough! :)

Working with Doug and Jackie was such an amazing experience from start to finish, but especially on the day of our wedding! We'd planned a rather ambitious ski/snowboard ceremony at Arapahoe Basin, and these guys hit every item on our wish list in an incredibly short time frame. Having never met us before, they hit the ground running, helping us get shots on the snow with our dogs and making us laugh and feel comfortable despite not exactly being a "photo-shoot" couple. From there we moved all over the mountain - getting the most beautiful shots with our wedding party (skiers and non-skiers), couples photos at the peak, and many action shots as we boarded from place to place. Jackie then led the ceremony beautifully, with Doug helping us to hit our marks and capturing every beautiful moment without a single rehearsal. Finally, they helped capture our post-ceremony ski procession down the mountain, followed by family and friends. We received the final edited photos almost immediately, and I could not have been more impressed. We are constantly getting compliments for how amazing they turned out, and will forever treasure the moments they captured. Both the photography and the officiating were of the highest quality at an amazing value. I cannot recommend this team enough.

Doug & Jackie are absolutely amazing!  They are extremely organized, and really took the time to understand our wedding vision.  They're both wonderfully talented photographers, and helped make our wedding day look as incredible and perfect as it felt to live!  Thank you both, forever!
